name: overview_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW overview_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.matches_played, dp.total_runs, bp.player_name AS batter_name, bp.total_wickets_taken, bp.player_of_match_awards, bs.player_name AS bowler_name, bs.total_wickets_taken AS bowler_wickets FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN batter_player_stats bp ON dp.player = bp.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bs ON dp.player = bs.player_name

name: exploration_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW exploration_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.runs, dp.match_id, ms.dates FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN match_summary ms ON dp.match_id = ms.match_id WHERE dp.player = ?

name: insight_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW insight_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.player_of_match_awards, dp.match_id, dp.total_runs, bs.total_wickets_taken, bp.total_wickets_taken FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN batter_player_stats bp ON dp.player = bp.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bs ON dp.player = bs.player_name WHERE dp.player = ?

name: detail_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW detail_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.opposition_team, dp.venue, dp.runs, dp.wickets, bs.total_wickets_taken, bp.total_wickets_taken FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN match_summary ms ON dp.match_id = ms.match_id JOIN batter_player_stats bp ON dp.player = bp.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bs ON dp.player = bs.player_name WHERE ms.dates = ?
